title: schoenorchis sumatrana
intro: Schoenorchis sumatrana, also known as the Sumatran orchid or Tiger orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schoenorchis sumatrana include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Schoenorchis sumatrana can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
